claims.claim: Har HaBituach (harb.cma.gov.il) is the CMA-operated aggregator listing every insurance policy an Israeli holds across all insurers; login via Israeli ID + one-time code.

Official government insurance tools: car.cma.gov.il is the CMA mandatory-car (hova) standardized-tariff calculator; govcarins.mof.gov.il is the Ministry of Finance comprehensive (makif) cost-estimation simulator.

Maccabi Zahav is the basic SHABAN supplementary tier (no medical underwriting); Maccabi Sheli is the premium add-on layered on top of Zahav (medical underwriting, higher surgery ceilings, free choice of surgeon).
Israeli insurance premiums are not subject to VAT; insurers are taxed as financial institutions (mosad kaspi), paying profit-and-payroll tax instead of charging VAT.

The Ministry of Health's proposed July 2025 order to stop kupot-channel bituach siudi sales was never finalized; sales continued and the operative wind-down horizon slipped to end-2026 (handoff) and 2027 (run-off clause removed).
The CMA tightened long-term-care patient eligibility to 4-of-6 ADLs effective January 1, 2025 (was 3-of-6).
Earthquake coverage is included by default in Israeli home policies on an opt-out basis, provided directly by each insurer (no central pool), with a typical deductible around 10%.
Wobi agreed to be acquired by The Phoenix Holdings; the deal was signed in October 2025 and is subject to CMA conditions.

SHABAN (kupot supplementary insurance) premiums are set by the Ministry of Health, uniform per age band within a kupa and non-negotiable; a member can only hold the SHABAN of their own kupa; SHABAN has guaranteed acceptance with no medical underwriting and no pre-existing-condition exclusions, unlike private commercial health policies which underwrite.

Illustrative/typical ranges used as guidance, not fixed regulated figures: a 10% earthquake deductible is typical; paying annually instead of monthly often saves about 5-8%; correcting shin-nun no-claims years can move premiums by roughly 10-20%; standard-construction rebuild value is roughly 6,000-8,000 ILS (6,000-8,000 ש"ח) per square meter.
